# Golden file: database cross-pack non-interference (E6)
# Verify that database packs from different systems don't interfere.
format: v1
---
# E6: PostgreSQL command matches postgresql pack only
command: psql -c "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E6: MySQL command matches mysql pack only
command: mysql -e "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-drop-table
---
# E6: MongoDB command matches mongodb pack only
command: mongosh --eval "db.dropDatabase()"
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mongodb
rule: mongo-drop-database
---
# E6: Redis command matches redis pack only
command: redis-cli FLUSHALL
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.redis
rule: redis-flushall
---
# E6: SQLite matches sqlite pack only
command: sqlite3 test.db "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.sqlite
rule: sqlite3-drop-table
---
# E6: Compound psql+mysql both match independently
command: psql -c "DROP DATABASE test" && mysql -e "DROP DATABASE test"
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
